title: senna praeterita
intro: Senna praeterita, also known as the lesser stembush or bush senna, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Senna praeterita are derived from its pods, which contain anthraquinone glycosides that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senna praeterita include its use as a laxative to alleviate constipation, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Senna praeterita can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of digestive disorders.
